panels.action: Opens travel booking website on laptop
panels.context: Office desk, 2 hours before flight

panels.action: Searches for available flights departing in 2 hours
panels.context: Search results loading slowly

panels.action: Filters results by departure time and price
panels.context: Too many irrelevant results shown

panels.action: Selects flight and proceeds to checkout
panels.context: Forced to create an account before booking

panels.action: Enters payment details
panels.context: Unclear error on credit card field

panels.action: Receives booking confirmation
panels.context: Confirmation email arrives instantly

panels.action: Opens job listing app on phone
panels.context: Sitting in hallway between classes

panels.action: Searches for part-time jobs near campus
panels.context: No filter for hours or distance available

panels.action: Scrolls through irrelevant full-time listings
panels.context: Small screen, dense list with no clear labels

panels.action: Taps on a relevant listing to read details
panels.context: Page takes long to load on campus wifi

panels.action: Hits apply button
panels.context: Redirected to external site requiring resume upload

panels.action: Navigates to hospital website from email link
panels.context: Desktop browser, large monitor

panels.action: Tries to find the appointment scheduling page
panels.context: Navigation menu has too many options

panels.action: Clicks wrong link and lands on billing page
panels.context: No clear back button visible

panels.action: Eventually finds scheduling page after searching
panels.context: Search bar returns unhelpful results

panels.action: Fills out appointment form
panels.context: Small font, unclear required fields

panels.action: Submits form successfully
panels.context: Confirmation message appears briefly then disappears

panels.action: Opens grocery app on phone
panels.context: Limited time during lunch break

panels.action: Searches for specific brand of cereal
panels.context: Search returns generic results not matching brand

panels.action: Adds items to cart
panels.context: App keeps suggesting sponsored products

panels.action: Proceeds to checkout
panels.context: Minimum order amount not met, shown at checkout only

panels.action: Adds extra item to meet minimum
panels.context: Delivery time slots all taken for today

panels.action: Schedules delivery for next day
panels.context: Confirmation sent to email

panels.action: Logs into invoicing tool
panels.context: Home office, end of month deadline pressure

panels.action: Creates a new invoice
panels.context: Template options are unclear and unlabeled

panels.action: Fills in client details and line items
panels.context: Tax field behavior is unclear

panels.action: Previews invoice before sending
panels.context: Preview looks different from final PDF

panels.action: Sends invoice to client via email
panels.context: No confirmation that email was delivered

panels.action: Checks sent folder to verify
panels.context: No sent history visible in the tool
